```{r}
library(arrow)
```

# Load single Datamine file

```{r}
#| eval: false
df <- read_parquet("_geology.parquet")
```

```{r}
head(df, 5)
```

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

df %>%
  count(ROCK) %>%
  ggplot(aes(ROCK, n)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#6C4F3D") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Rock Type Distribution")
```
